assets.rs

1use std::path::{Path, PathBuf};
2use tauri::State;
3
4use crate::error::TessellumError;
5use crate::models::{AppState, AssetIndex};
6use crate::utils::{normalize_path, sanitize_string, validate_path_in_vault};
7
8const SUPPORTED_EXTS: &[&str] = &[
9	"png", "jpg", "jpeg", "gif", "webp", "svg", "bmp", "tif", "tiff", "avif", "pdf",
10];
11
12fn is_supported_ext(ext: &str) -> bool {
13	SUPPORTED_EXTS.contains(&ext)
14}
15
16fn is_supported_asset(path: &Path) -> bool {
17	let ext = path.extension().and_then(|s| s.to_str()).unwrap_or("").to_lowercase();
18	is_supported_ext(ext.as_str())
19}
20
21fn to_asset_path(path: &Path) -> String {
22	let raw = path.to_string_lossy().to_string();
23	raw.strip_prefix("\\\\?\\")
24		.unwrap_or(&raw)
25		.to_string()
26}
27
28async fn resolve_asset_inner(
29	state: &AppState,
30	vault_path: &str,
31	target: &str,
32	source_path: Option<&str>,
33	mode: &str,
34) -> Result<Option<String>, TessellumError> {
35	let target = target.trim();
36	
37	if target.starts_with("http://") || target.starts_with("https://") || target.starts_with("data:") {
38		return Ok(None);
39	}
40	
41	if mode == "markdown" {
42		let base_dir = source_path
43			.and_then(|p| Path::new(p).parent())
44			.unwrap_or(Path::new(vault_path));
45		
46		let resolved_path = if Path::new(target).is_absolute() {
47			PathBuf::from(target)
48		} else {
49			base_dir.join(target)
50		};
51		
52		if !resolved_path.exists() {
53			return Ok(None);
54		}
55		
56		let resolved = validate_path_in_vault(&resolved_path.to_string_lossy(), vault_path)
57			.map_err(TessellumError::Validation)?;
58		
59		if !is_supported_asset(&resolved) {
60			return Ok(None);
61		}
62		
63		return Ok(Some(to_asset_path(&resolved)));
64	}
65	
66	let mut index_guard = state.asset_index.lock().await;
67	if index_guard.is_none() {
68		let idx = AssetIndex::build(vault_path)
69			.map_err(|e| TessellumError::Internal(format!("Failed to build asset index: {}", e)))?;
70		*index_guard = Some(idx);
71	}
72	
73	let asset_index = index_guard.as_ref().unwrap();
74	Ok(asset_index
75		.resolve(vault_path, target)
76		.map(|p| to_asset_path(&p)))
77}
78
79async fn save_asset_inner(
80	state: &AppState,
81	vault_path: &str,
82	target_dir: &str,
83	base_name: &str,
84	extension: &str,
85	bytes: Vec<u8>,
86) -> Result<String, TessellumError> {
87	let ext_raw = extension.trim().trim_start_matches('.');
88	if ext_raw.is_empty() {
89		return Err(TessellumError::Validation("Unsupported file type".to_string()));
90	}
91	if !is_supported_ext(&ext_raw.to_lowercase()) {
92		return Err(TessellumError::Validation("Unsupported file type".to_string()));
93	}
94	
95	let clean_base = sanitize_string(base_name.to_string());
96	let base = if clean_base.trim().is_empty() {
97		"Pasted file".to_string()
98	} else {
99		clean_base
100	};
101	
102	let vault_root = validate_path_in_vault(vault_path, vault_path)
103		.map_err(TessellumError::Validation)?;
104	
105	let dir_path = if target_dir.trim().is_empty() {
106		vault_root.to_path_buf()
107	} else {
108		let candidate = Path::new(target_dir);
109		let full = if candidate.is_absolute() {
110			candidate.to_path_buf()
111		} else {
112			vault_root.join(candidate)
113		};
114		validate_path_in_vault(&full.to_string_lossy(), vault_path)
115			.map_err(TessellumError::Validation)?
116	};
117	
118	tokio::fs::create_dir_all(&dir_path).await?;
119	
120	let mut filename = format!("{}.{}", base, ext_raw);
121	let mut final_path = dir_path.join(&filename);
122	let mut counter = 1;
123	while final_path.exists() {
124		filename = format!("{}-{}.{}", base, counter, ext_raw);
125		final_path = dir_path.join(&filename);
126		counter += 1;
127	}
128	
129	tokio::fs::write(&final_path, bytes).await?;
130	
131	let mut index_guard = state.asset_index.lock().await;
132	*index_guard = None;
133	
134	let final_resolved = validate_path_in_vault(&final_path.to_string_lossy(), vault_path)
135		.map_err(TessellumError::Validation)?;
136	let relative = final_resolved.strip_prefix(&vault_root).unwrap_or(&final_resolved);
137	Ok(normalize_path(&relative.to_string_lossy()))
138}
139
140#[tauri::command]
141pub async fn resolve_asset(
142	state: State<'_, AppState>,
143	vault_path: String,
144	target: String,
145	source_path: Option<String>,
146	mode: String,
147) -> Result<Option<String>, TessellumError> {
148	resolve_asset_inner(state.inner(), &vault_path, &target, source_path.as_deref(), &mode).await
149}
150
151#[tauri::command]
152pub async fn save_asset(
153	state: State<'_, AppState>,
154	vault_path: String,
155	target_dir: String,
156	base_name: String,
157	extension: String,
158	bytes: Vec<u8>,
159) -> Result<String, TessellumError> {
160	save_asset_inner(
161		state.inner(),
162		&vault_path,
163		&target_dir,
164		&base_name,
165		&extension,
166		bytes,
167	)
168	.await
169}
170
171#[cfg(test)]
172mod tests {
173	use tempfile::tempdir;
174
175	use super::{resolve_asset_inner, save_asset_inner};
176	use crate::db::Database;
177	use crate::models::AppState;
178	use crate::search::SearchIndex;
179
180	async fn build_app_state(vault_path: &str) -> AppState {
181		let db_dir = tempdir().unwrap();
182		let db = Database::init(db_dir.path().join("test.sqlite").to_str().unwrap())
183			.await
184			.unwrap();
185		let search_dir = tempdir().unwrap();
186		let index_path = search_dir.path().join("search-index");
187		let search_index = SearchIndex::open_or_create(&index_path).unwrap();
188		let state = AppState::new(db, search_index);
189		let _ = vault_path;
190		state
191	}
192
193	#[tokio::test]
194	async fn resolve_asset_ignores_remote_targets_and_resolves_markdown_relative_files() {
195		let vault = tempdir().unwrap();
196		let note_dir = vault.path().join("Notes");
197		std::fs::create_dir_all(&note_dir).unwrap();
198		let note_path = note_dir.join("Entry.md");
199		let image_path = note_dir.join("Diagram.png");
200		std::fs::write(&note_path, "# Entry").unwrap();
201		std::fs::write(&image_path, "png").unwrap();
202		let state = build_app_state(vault.path().to_str().unwrap()).await;
203
204		let remote = resolve_asset_inner(
205			&state,
206			vault.path().to_str().unwrap(),
207			"https://example.com/file.png",
208			Some(note_path.to_str().unwrap()),
209			"markdown",
210		)
211		.await
212		.unwrap();
213		assert_eq!(remote, None);
214
215		let resolved = resolve_asset_inner(
216			&state,
217			vault.path().to_str().unwrap(),
218			"Diagram.png",
219			Some(note_path.to_str().unwrap()),
220			"markdown",
221		)
222		.await
223		.unwrap();
224		assert_eq!(resolved, Some(image_path.to_string_lossy().to_string()));
225	}
226
227	#[tokio::test]
228	async fn save_asset_sanitizes_names_and_appends_collision_suffixes() {
229		let vault = tempdir().unwrap();
230		let assets_dir = vault.path().join("Assets");
231		std::fs::create_dir_all(&assets_dir).unwrap();
232		std::fs::write(assets_dir.join("Budget 1.png"), "existing").unwrap();
233		let state = build_app_state(vault.path().to_str().unwrap()).await;
234
235		let first = save_asset_inner(
236			&state,
237			vault.path().to_str().unwrap(),
238			"Assets",
239			"Budget #1",
240			"png",
241			vec![1, 2, 3],
242		)
243		.await
244		.unwrap();
245		let second = save_asset_inner(
246			&state,
247			vault.path().to_str().unwrap(),
248			"Assets",
249			"Budget #1",
250			"png",
251			vec![4, 5, 6],
252		)
253		.await
254		.unwrap();
255
256		assert_eq!(first, "Assets/Budget 1-1.png");
257		assert_eq!(second, "Assets/Budget 1-2.png");
258		assert!(assets_dir.join("Budget 1-1.png").exists());
259		assert!(assets_dir.join("Budget 1-2.png").exists());
260	}
261
262	#[tokio::test]
263	async fn save_asset_rejects_unsupported_extensions() {
264		let vault = tempdir().unwrap();
265		let state = build_app_state(vault.path().to_str().unwrap()).await;
266
267		let err = save_asset_inner(
268			&state,
269			vault.path().to_str().unwrap(),
270			"",
271			"script",
272			"exe",
273			vec![1],
274		)
275		.await
276		.unwrap_err();
277
278		assert!(err.to_string().contains("Unsupported file type"));
279	}
280}

clipboard.rs

1use crate::error::TessellumError;
2use crate::utils::{normalize_path, validate_path_in_vault};
3use serde::Serialize;
4use std::path::{Path, PathBuf};
5
6#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]
7#[serde(rename_all = "camelCase")]
8pub struct ClipboardImportResult {
9	pub imported_paths: Vec<String>,
10	pub skipped_count: usize,
11}
12
13#[repr(C)]
14#[derive(Clone, Copy)]
15struct DropFilesHeader {
16	p_files: u32,
17	pt_x: i32,
18	pt_y: i32,
19	f_nc: i32,
20	f_wide: i32,
21}
22
23fn split_file_name(file_name: &str) -> (&str, &str) {
24	match file_name.rsplit_once('.') {
25		Some((stem, extension)) if !stem.is_empty() => (stem, extension),
26		_ => (file_name, ""),
27	}
28}
29
30fn next_available_name(file_name: &str, exists: impl Fn(&str) -> bool) -> String {
31	if !exists(file_name) {
32		return file_name.to_string();
33	}
34	
35	let (stem, extension) = split_file_name(file_name);
36	let suffix = if extension.is_empty() {
37		String::new()
38	} else {
39		format!(".{extension}")
40	};
41	
42	let mut copy_index = 1;
43	loop {
44		let candidate = format!("{stem} ({copy_index}){suffix}");
45		if !exists(&candidate) {
46			return candidate;
47		}
48		copy_index += 1;
49	}
50}
51
52fn resolve_unique_target_path(destination_dir: &Path, file_name: &str) -> PathBuf {
53	let resolved_name = next_available_name(file_name, |candidate| destination_dir.join(candidate).exists());
54	destination_dir.join(resolved_name)
55}
56
57async fn copy_file_entry(source_path: &Path, destination_dir: &Path) -> Result<String, TessellumError> {
58	let file_name = source_path
59		.file_name()
60		.and_then(|value| value.to_str())
61		.ok_or_else(|| TessellumError::Validation("Clipboard item must have a valid file name".to_string()))?;
62	let target_path = resolve_unique_target_path(destination_dir, file_name);
63	
64	tokio::fs::copy(source_path, &target_path).await.map_err(TessellumError::from)?;
65	Ok(normalize_path(&target_path.to_string_lossy()))
66}
67
68async fn copy_directory_contents(source_dir: &Path, destination_dir: &Path) -> Result<(), TessellumError> {
69	let mut pending_dirs = vec![(source_dir.to_path_buf(), destination_dir.to_path_buf())];
70	
71	while let Some((current_source, current_destination)) = pending_dirs.pop() {
72		tokio::fs::create_dir_all(&current_destination).await.map_err(TessellumError::from)?;
73		
74		let mut entries = tokio::fs::read_dir(&current_source).await.map_err(TessellumError::from)?;
75		while let Some(entry) = entries.next_entry().await.map_err(TessellumError::from)? {
76			let entry_path = entry.path();
77			let entry_type = entry.file_type().await.map_err(TessellumError::from)?;
78			let target_path = current_destination.join(entry.file_name());
79			
80			if entry_type.is_dir() {
81				pending_dirs.push((entry_path, target_path));
82				continue;
83			}
84			
85			if entry_type.is_file() {
86				tokio::fs::copy(&entry_path, &target_path).await.map_err(TessellumError::from)?;
87			}
88		}
89	}
90	
91	Ok(())
92}
93
94async fn copy_directory_entry(source_path: &Path, destination_dir: &Path) -> Result<String, TessellumError> {
95	let dir_name = source_path
96		.file_name()
97		.and_then(|value| value.to_str())
98		.ok_or_else(|| TessellumError::Validation("Clipboard item must have a valid folder name".to_string()))?;
99	let target_path = resolve_unique_target_path(destination_dir, dir_name);
100	
101	copy_directory_contents(source_path, &target_path).await?;
102	Ok(normalize_path(&target_path.to_string_lossy()))
103}
104
105async fn copy_clipboard_entry(source_path: &Path, destination_dir: &Path) -> Result<Option<String>, TessellumError> {
106	if !source_path.exists() {
107		return Ok(None);
108	}
109	
110	if source_path.is_file() {
111		return copy_file_entry(source_path, destination_dir).await.map(Some);
112	}
113	
114	if source_path.is_dir() {
115		return copy_directory_entry(source_path, destination_dir).await.map(Some);
116	}
117	
118	Ok(None)
119}
120
121fn build_file_drop_data(paths: &[PathBuf]) -> Result<Vec<u8>, TessellumError> {
122	let header = DropFilesHeader {
123		p_files: std::mem::size_of::<DropFilesHeader>() as u32,
124		pt_x: 0,
125		pt_y: 0,
126		f_nc: 0,
127		f_wide: 1,
128	};
129	
130	let joined_paths = paths
131		.iter()
132		.map(|path| {
133			path.to_str()
134				.ok_or_else(|| TessellumError::Validation("Clipboard path must be valid UTF-8".to_string()))
135		})
136		.collect::<Result<Vec<_>, _>>()?
137		.join("\0");
138	
139	let wide_paths: Vec<u16> = format!("{joined_paths}\0\0").encode_utf16().collect();
140	let payload_size = std::mem::size_of::<DropFilesHeader>() + (wide_paths.len() * std::mem::size_of::<u16>());
141	let mut payload = vec![0u8; payload_size];
142	
143	unsafe {
144		std::ptr::copy_nonoverlapping(
145			(&header as *const DropFilesHeader).cast::<u8>(),
146			payload.as_mut_ptr(),
147			std::mem::size_of::<DropFilesHeader>(),
148		);
149		std::ptr::copy_nonoverlapping(
150			wide_paths.as_ptr().cast::<u8>(),
151			payload.as_mut_ptr().add(std::mem::size_of::<DropFilesHeader>()),
152			wide_paths.len() * std::mem::size_of::<u16>(),
153		);
154	}
155	
156	Ok(payload)
157}
158
159#[cfg(target_os = "windows")]
160fn read_clipboard_file_paths() -> Result<Vec<PathBuf>, TessellumError> {
161	use windows_sys::Win32::System::DataExchange::{CloseClipboard, GetClipboardData, OpenClipboard};
162	use windows_sys::Win32::UI::Shell::DragQueryFileW;
163	
164	const CF_HDROP_FORMAT: u32 = 15;
165	
166	unsafe {
167		if OpenClipboard(std::ptr::null_mut()) == 0 {
168			return Err(TessellumError::Internal("Failed to open the system clipboard".to_string()));
169		}
170		
171		let result = (|| {
172			let handle = GetClipboardData(CF_HDROP_FORMAT);
173			if handle.is_null() {
174				return Ok(Vec::new());
175			}
176			
177			let file_count = DragQueryFileW(handle as _, u32::MAX, std::ptr::null_mut(), 0);
178			let mut file_paths = Vec::with_capacity(file_count as usize);
179			
180			for index in 0..file_count {
181				let required_length = DragQueryFileW(handle as _, index, std::ptr::null_mut(), 0);
182				if required_length == 0 {
183					continue;
184				}
185				
186				let mut buffer = vec![0u16; required_length as usize + 1];
187				let copied_length = DragQueryFileW(handle as _, index, buffer.as_mut_ptr(), buffer.len() as u32);
188				if copied_length == 0 {
189					continue;
190				}
191				
192				let path = String::from_utf16_lossy(&buffer[..copied_length as usize]);
193				file_paths.push(PathBuf::from(path));
194			}
195			
196			Ok(file_paths)
197		})();
198		
199		CloseClipboard();
200		result
201	}
202}
203
204#[cfg(not(target_os = "windows"))]
205fn read_clipboard_file_paths() -> Result<Vec<PathBuf>, TessellumError> {
206	Err(TessellumError::Internal(
207		"OS clipboard file paste is currently only supported on Windows".to_string(),
208	))
209}
210
211#[cfg(target_os = "windows")]
212fn write_clipboard_file_paths(paths: &[PathBuf]) -> Result<(), TessellumError> {
213	use windows_sys::Win32::Foundation::HANDLE;
214	use windows_sys::Win32::System::DataExchange::{
215		CloseClipboard, EmptyClipboard, OpenClipboard, SetClipboardData,
216	};
217	use windows_sys::Win32::System::Memory::{
218		GlobalAlloc, GlobalLock, GlobalUnlock, GMEM_MOVEABLE,
219	};
220	
221	const CF_HDROP_FORMAT: u32 = 15;
222	let payload = build_file_drop_data(paths)?;
223	
224	unsafe {
225		if OpenClipboard(std::ptr::null_mut()) == 0 {
226			return Err(TessellumError::Internal("Failed to open the system clipboard".to_string()));
227		}
228		
229		let result = (|| {
230			if EmptyClipboard() == 0 {
231				return Err(TessellumError::Internal("Failed to clear the system clipboard".to_string()));
232			}
233			
234			let handle = GlobalAlloc(GMEM_MOVEABLE, payload.len());
235			if handle.is_null() {
236				return Err(TessellumError::Internal("Failed to allocate clipboard memory".to_string()));
237			}
238			
239			let buffer = GlobalLock(handle) as *mut u8;
240			if buffer.is_null() {
241				return Err(TessellumError::Internal("Failed to lock clipboard memory".to_string()));
242			}
243			
244			std::ptr::copy_nonoverlapping(payload.as_ptr(), buffer, payload.len());
245			GlobalUnlock(handle);
246			
247			let clipboard_handle: HANDLE = SetClipboardData(CF_HDROP_FORMAT, handle);
248			if clipboard_handle.is_null() {
249				return Err(TessellumError::Internal("Failed to write file paths to the system clipboard".to_string()));
250			}
251			
252			Ok(())
253		})();
254		
255		CloseClipboard();
256		result
257	}
258}
259
260#[cfg(not(target_os = "windows"))]
261fn write_clipboard_file_paths(_: &[PathBuf]) -> Result<(), TessellumError> {
262	Err(TessellumError::Internal(
263		"OS clipboard file copy is currently only supported on Windows".to_string(),
264	))
265}
266
267#[tauri::command]
268pub async fn write_file_paths_to_clipboard(paths: Vec<String>) -> Result<(), TessellumError> {
269	let path_bufs = paths.into_iter().map(PathBuf::from).collect::<Vec<_>>();
270	write_clipboard_file_paths(&path_bufs)
271}
272
273#[tauri::command]
274pub async fn import_clipboard_files(
275	vault_path: String,
276	destination_dir: String,
277) -> Result<ClipboardImportResult, TessellumError> {
278	validate_path_in_vault(&destination_dir, &vault_path).map_err(TessellumError::Validation)?;
279	
280	let destination_path = Path::new(&destination_dir);
281	let destination_metadata = tokio::fs::metadata(destination_path).await.map_err(TessellumError::from)?;
282	if !destination_metadata.is_dir() {
283		return Err(TessellumError::Validation("Destination must be a folder".to_string()));
284	}
285	
286	let clipboard_paths = read_clipboard_file_paths()?;
287	let mut imported_paths = Vec::new();
288	let mut skipped_count = 0usize;
289	
290	for source_path in clipboard_paths {
291		match copy_clipboard_entry(&source_path, destination_path).await? {
292			Some(imported_path) => imported_paths.push(imported_path),
293			None => skipped_count += 1,
294		}
295	}
296	
297	Ok(ClipboardImportResult {
298		imported_paths,
299		skipped_count,
300	})
301}
302
303#[cfg(test)]
304mod tests {
305	use super::{
306		build_file_drop_data, copy_clipboard_entry, next_available_name, resolve_unique_target_path, DropFilesHeader,
307	};
308	use std::path::PathBuf;
309	use tempfile::tempdir;
310	
311	#[test]
312	fn auto_rename_preserves_extension_when_destination_exists() {
313		let taken = vec!["photo.png".to_string(), "photo (1).png".to_string()];
314		let next = next_available_name("photo.png", |candidate| taken.iter().any(|value| value == candidate));
315		
316		assert_eq!(next, "photo (2).png");
317	}
318	
319	#[test]
320	fn auto_rename_handles_extensionless_names() {
321		let taken = vec!["LICENSE".to_string()];
322		let next = next_available_name("LICENSE", |candidate| taken.iter().any(|value| value == candidate));
323		
324		assert_eq!(next, "LICENSE (1)");
325	}
326	
327	#[test]
328	fn build_file_drop_data_uses_double_null_terminated_utf16_paths() {
329		let payload = build_file_drop_data(&[
330			PathBuf::from("C:/vault/one.md"),
331			PathBuf::from("C:/vault/two.md"),
332		]).expect("payload");
333		
334		let header_len = std::mem::size_of::<DropFilesHeader>();
335		let utf16_units = payload[header_len..]
336			.chunks_exact(2)
337			.map(|chunk| u16::from_le_bytes([chunk[0], chunk[1]]))
338			.collect::<Vec<_>>();
339		
340		assert!(utf16_units.ends_with(&[0, 0]));
341		let text = String::from_utf16_lossy(&utf16_units);
342		assert!(text.contains("C:/vault/one.md"));
343		assert!(text.contains("C:/vault/two.md"));
344	}
345	
346	#[test]
347	fn resolve_unique_target_path_renames_conflicting_folder_names() {
348		let temp = tempdir().expect("tempdir");
349		std::fs::create_dir(temp.path().join("Folder")).expect("existing folder");
350		
351		let target = resolve_unique_target_path(temp.path(), "Folder");
352		
353		assert_eq!(target.file_name().and_then(|value| value.to_str()), Some("Folder (1)"));
354	}
355	
356	#[tokio::test]
357	async fn copy_clipboard_entry_copies_directories_recursively() {
358		let source_root = tempdir().expect("source");
359		let destination_root = tempdir().expect("destination");
360		let source_dir = source_root.path().join("Folder");
361		let nested_dir = source_dir.join("nested");
362		
363		std::fs::create_dir_all(&nested_dir).expect("nested dir");
364		std::fs::write(source_dir.join("top.md"), "top").expect("top file");
365		std::fs::write(nested_dir.join("deep.md"), "deep").expect("nested file");
366		
367		let imported = copy_clipboard_entry(&source_dir, destination_root.path())
368			.await
369			.expect("copy")
370			.expect("imported path");
371		
372		assert!(imported.ends_with("Folder"));
373		assert!(destination_root.path().join("Folder").join("top.md").exists());
374		assert!(destination_root.path().join("Folder").join("nested").join("deep.md").exists());
375	}
376}
folders.rs - sourceSkip to main content

Files

tessellum_lib\commands/
folders.rs

1use std::path::Path;
2
3use crate::utils::sanitize_string;
4
5/// Asynchronous command to create a new folder within a specified vault path.
6///
7/// This function performs the following operations:
8/// 1. Sanitizes the provided folder name to ensure it is safe to use in file paths.
9/// 2. Validates that the folder name is not empty after sanitization.
10/// 3. Checks if a folder with the same name already exists at the desired location.
11/// 4. Creates the folder if it does not already exist.
12#[tauri::command]
13pub async fn create_folder(vault_path: String, folder_name: String) -> Result<String, String> {
14    let sanitized_folder_name = sanitize_string(folder_name);
15    
16    // SECURITY & VALIDATION:
17    // Ensure the name isn't empty after sanitization.
18    if sanitized_folder_name.trim().is_empty() {
19        return Err("Invalid folder name: Name cannot be empty".to_string());
20    }
21    
22    let folder_path = Path::new(&vault_path).join(&sanitized_folder_name);
23    
24    // Validate the resulting path stays inside the vault
25    let vault_canonical = Path::new(&vault_path)
26        .canonicalize()
27        .map_err(|e| format!("Invalid vault path: {}", e))?;
28    let candidate = vault_canonical.join(&sanitized_folder_name);
29    if !candidate.starts_with(&vault_canonical) {
30        return Err("Security Error: Cannot create folder outside the vault".to_string());
31    }
32    
33    // Check for existence
34    if folder_path.exists() {
35        return Err(String::from("Folder already exists"));
36    }
37    
38    // Create the directory
39    tokio::fs::create_dir(&folder_path)
40        .await
41        .map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
42    
43    Ok(folder_path.to_string_lossy().to_string())
44}
45
46#[cfg(test)]
47mod tests {
48    use std::fs;
49
50    use tempfile::tempdir;
51
52    use super::create_folder;
53
54    #[tokio::test]
55    async fn creates_a_folder_inside_the_vault() {
56        let vault = tempdir().unwrap();
57
58        let created = create_folder(
59            vault.path().to_str().unwrap().to_string(),
60            "Projects".to_string(),
61        )
62        .await
63        .unwrap();
64
65        assert!(vault.path().join("Projects").exists());
66        assert_eq!(created, vault.path().join("Projects").to_string_lossy());
67    }
68
69    #[tokio::test]
70    async fn rejects_empty_names_after_sanitization() {
71        let vault = tempdir().unwrap();
72
73        let err = create_folder(
74            vault.path().to_str().unwrap().to_string(),
75            "...   ".to_string(),
76        )
77        .await
78        .unwrap_err();
79
80        assert!(err.contains("Name cannot be empty"));
81    }
82
83    #[tokio::test]
84    async fn rejects_duplicate_folder_creation() {
85        let vault = tempdir().unwrap();
86        fs::create_dir_all(vault.path().join("Projects")).unwrap();
87
88        let err = create_folder(
89            vault.path().to_str().unwrap().to_string(),
90            "Projects".to_string(),
91        )
92        .await
93        .unwrap_err();
94
95        assert_eq!(err, "Folder already exists");
96    }
97}

Files

tessellum_lib\commands/
graph.rs

1use serde::Serialize;
2use std::collections::HashSet;
3use tauri::State;
4
5use crate::error::TessellumError;
6use crate::models::AppState;
7
8#[derive(Serialize, Clone)]
9pub struct GraphNode {
10	pub id: String,
11	pub label: String,
12	pub exists: bool,
13	pub orphan: bool,
14	pub tags: Vec<String>,
15}
16
17#[derive(Serialize, Clone)]
18pub struct GraphEdge {
19	pub source: String,
20	pub target: String,
21	pub broken: bool,
22}
23
24#[derive(Serialize, Clone)]
25pub struct GraphData {
26	pub nodes: Vec<GraphNode>,
27	pub edges: Vec<GraphEdge>,
28}
29
30fn path_to_label(path: &str, vault_path: &str) -> String {
31	let normalized = crate::utils::normalize_path(path);
32	let normalized_vault = crate::utils::normalize_path(vault_path);
33	
34	let mut relative = normalized;
35	if relative.starts_with(&normalized_vault) {
36		relative = relative[normalized_vault.len()..].to_string();
37		if relative.starts_with('/') {
38			relative = relative[1..].to_string();
39		}
40	}
41	
42	if let Some(stripped) = relative.strip_suffix(".md") {
43		relative = stripped.to_string();
44	}
45	
46	let parts: Vec<&str> = relative.split('/').collect();
47	parts.last().unwrap_or(&"").to_string()
48}
49
50/// Retrieves data for the graph view, resolving paths and checking status on the backend.
51#[tauri::command]
52pub async fn get_graph_data(
53	state: State<'_, AppState>,
54	vault_path: String,
55) -> Result<GraphData, TessellumError> {
56	build_graph_data(&state, &vault_path).await
57}
58
59/// Execute a GQL/Cypher query on the Grafeo database
60#[tauri::command]
61pub fn execute_graph_query(cypher: String) -> Result<serde_json::Value, TessellumError> {
62	crate::grafeo_projection::execute_query(&cypher)
63		.map_err(|e| TessellumError::Internal(e))
64}
65
66pub async fn build_graph_data(
67	state: &AppState,
68	vault_path: &str,
69) -> Result<GraphData, TessellumError> {
70	let db = state.db.clone();
71	
72	let notes = db
73		.get_all_indexed_files()
74		.await
75		.map_err(TessellumError::from)?;
76	let links = db
77		.get_all_links()
78		.await
79		.map_err(TessellumError::from)?;
80	let broken_links: HashSet<(String, String)> = db
81		.get_broken_links()
82		.await
83		.map_err(TessellumError::from)?
84		.into_iter()
85		.map(|(s, t)| {
86			(
87				crate::utils::normalize_path(&s),
88				crate::utils::normalize_path(&t),
89			)
90		})
91		.collect();
92	
93	let orphaned_files: HashSet<String> = db
94		.get_orphaned_files()
95		.await
96		.map_err(TessellumError::from)?
97		.into_iter()
98		.map(|p| crate::utils::normalize_path(&p))
99		.collect();
100	
101	let file_tags = db
102		.get_files_tags()
103		.await
104		.map_err(TessellumError::from)?;
105	
106	let mut nodes = Vec::new();
107	let mut edges = Vec::new();
108	
109	let mut existing_paths = HashSet::new();
110	
111	// Add existing nodes
112	for (path, _) in notes {
113		let normalized = crate::utils::normalize_path(&path);
114		existing_paths.insert(normalized.clone());
115		
116		let tags = file_tags.get(&path).cloned().unwrap_or_default();
117		
118		nodes.push(GraphNode {
119			id: normalized.clone(),
120			label: path_to_label(&path, vault_path),
121			exists: true,
122			orphan: orphaned_files.contains(&normalized),
123			tags,
124		});
125	}
126	
127	// Add edges and missing target nodes
128	for (source, target) in links {
129		let normalized_source = crate::utils::normalize_path(&source);
130		let normalized_target = crate::utils::normalize_path(&target);
131		
132		let broken = broken_links.contains(&(normalized_source.clone(), normalized_target.clone()));
133		
134		if broken && !existing_paths.contains(&normalized_target) {
135			// Check if we already added a ghost node for this target
136			let already_added = nodes.iter().any(|n| n.id == normalized_target);
137			if !already_added {
138				nodes.push(GraphNode {
139					id: normalized_target.clone(),
140					label: path_to_label(&target, vault_path),
141					exists: false,
142					orphan: false,
143					tags: Vec::new(),
144				});
145				existing_paths.insert(normalized_target.clone());
146			}
147		}
148		
149		edges.push(GraphEdge {
150			source: normalized_source,
151			target: normalized_target,
152			broken,
153		});
154	}
155	
156	Ok(GraphData { nodes, edges })
157}
158
159#[cfg(test)]
160mod tests {
161    use tempfile::tempdir;
162
163    use super::{build_graph_data, path_to_label};
164    use crate::db::Database;
165    use crate::models::AppState;
166    use crate::search::SearchIndex;
167
168    #[test]
169    fn strips_vault_prefix_and_markdown_extension_for_labels() {
170        assert_eq!(
171            path_to_label("Vault/Projects/Plan.md", "Vault"),
172            "Plan"
173        );
174        assert_eq!(path_to_label("Vault/Projects/Image.png", "Vault"), "Image.png");
175    }
176
177    #[tokio::test]
178    async fn builds_graph_data_with_existing_orphan_and_broken_nodes() {
179        let dir = tempdir().unwrap();
180        let db = Database::init(dir.path().join("graph.sqlite").to_str().unwrap())
181            .await
182            .unwrap();
183        let alpha = dir.path().join("Vault/Alpha.md");
184        let beta = dir.path().join("Vault/Beta.md");
185        let orphan = dir.path().join("Vault/Orphan.md");
186        let missing = dir.path().join("Vault/Missing.md");
187        db.index_file(
188            &alpha.to_string_lossy(),
189            1,
190            10,
191            Some(r#"{"tags":["project"]}"#),
192            None,
193            &[
194                beta.to_string_lossy().to_string(),
195                missing.to_string_lossy().to_string(),
196            ],
197        )
198        .await
199        .unwrap();
200        db.index_file(&beta.to_string_lossy(), 1, 10, None, None, &[]).await.unwrap();
201        db.index_file(&orphan.to_string_lossy(), 1, 10, None, None, &[]).await.unwrap();
202
203        let search_dir = tempdir().unwrap();
204        let app_state = AppState::new(db, SearchIndex::open_or_create(&search_dir.path().join("search-index")).unwrap());
205        let normalized_alpha = crate::utils::normalize_path(&alpha.to_string_lossy());
206        let normalized_orphan = crate::utils::normalize_path(&orphan.to_string_lossy());
207        let normalized_missing = crate::utils::normalize_path(&missing.to_string_lossy());
208
209        let graph = build_graph_data(&app_state, dir.path().join("Vault").to_str().unwrap()).await.unwrap();
210
211        assert!(graph.nodes.iter().any(|node| node.id == normalized_alpha && node.exists));
212        assert!(graph.nodes.iter().any(|node| node.id == normalized_orphan && node.orphan));
213        assert!(graph.nodes.iter().any(|node| node.id == normalized_missing && !node.exists));
214        assert!(graph.edges.iter().any(|edge| edge.target == normalized_missing && edge.broken));
215    }
216}

tessellum_lib\commands/
indexer.rs

1use serde::Serialize;
2use tauri::State;
3
4use crate::error::TessellumError;
5use crate::indexer::{IndexStats, VaultIndexer};
6use crate::grafeo_projection::{sync_full, ManagedGrafeoConnection};
7use crate::models::AppState;
8
9/// Response from the sync_vault command.
10#[derive(Serialize)]
11pub struct SyncResult {
12    pub success: bool,
13    pub files_indexed: usize,
14    pub files_deleted: usize,
15    pub files_skipped: usize,
16    pub duration_ms: u128,
17    pub error: Option<String>,
18}
19
20impl From<IndexStats> for SyncResult {
21    fn from(stats: IndexStats) -> Self {
22        Self {
23            success: true,
24            files_indexed: stats.files_indexed,
25            files_deleted: stats.files_deleted,
26            files_skipped: stats.files_skipped,
27            duration_ms: stats.duration_ms,
28            error: None,
29        }
30    }
31}
32
33/// Synchronize the vault database with the filesystem.
34///
35/// This command should be called by the frontend after loading the vault path.
36/// It scans all .md files, indexes new/modified files, and removes deleted files.
37#[tauri::command]
38pub async fn sync_vault(
39    state: State<'_, AppState>,
40    kuzu_state: State<'_, ManagedGrafeoConnection>,
41    vault_path: String,
42) -> Result<SyncResult, TessellumError> {
43    run_sync_vault(state.inner(), kuzu_state.inner(), &vault_path).await
44}
45
46pub async fn run_sync_vault(
47    state: &AppState,
48    grafeo_state: &ManagedGrafeoConnection,
49    vault_path: &str,
50) -> Result<SyncResult, TessellumError> {
51    let db = state.db.clone();
52    let search_index = state.search_index.clone();
53    
54    match VaultIndexer::full_sync(db.as_ref(), search_index, vault_path).await {
55        Ok(stats) => {
56            // Only do full Grafeo sync if this is an initial/manual sync with many changes
57            // Individual note changes are synced incrementally via write_file command
58            let total_changes = stats.files_indexed + stats.files_deleted;
59            if total_changes > 10 {
60                if let Err(err) = sync_full(grafeo_state, db.as_ref()).await {
61                    log::warn!(
62                        "Grafeo sync_full failed after vault sync for '{}': {}",
63                        vault_path,
64                        err
65                    );
66                }
67            }
68            let mut idx_guard = state.file_index.lock().await;
69            *idx_guard = None;
70            let mut asset_guard = state.asset_index.lock().await;
71            *asset_guard = None;
72            Ok(SyncResult::from(stats))
73        }
74        Err(e) => Ok(SyncResult {
75            success: false,
76            files_indexed: 0,
77            files_deleted: 0,
78            files_skipped: 0,
79            duration_ms: 0,
80            error: Some(e),
81        }),
82    }
83}
84
85#[cfg(test)]
86mod tests {
87    use tempfile::tempdir;
88
89    use super::{run_sync_vault, SyncResult};
90    use crate::db::Database;
91    use crate::grafeo_projection::ManagedGrafeoConnection;
92    use crate::models::{AppState, AssetIndex, FileIndex};
93    use crate::search::SearchIndex;
94    use crate::test_support::TestVault;
95
96    #[test]
97    fn sync_result_maps_index_stats_fields() {
98        let result = SyncResult::from(crate::indexer::IndexStats {
99            files_indexed: 2,
100            files_deleted: 1,
101            files_skipped: 3,
102            duration_ms: 42,
103        });
104
105        assert!(result.success);
106        assert_eq!(result.files_indexed, 2);
107        assert_eq!(result.files_deleted, 1);
108        assert_eq!(result.files_skipped, 3);
109        assert_eq!(result.duration_ms, 42);
110        assert_eq!(result.error, None);
111    }
112
113    #[tokio::test]
114    async fn run_sync_vault_returns_success_and_invalidates_cached_indexes() {
115        let vault = TestVault::new()
116            .with_markdown("Inbox/Alpha.md", "# Alpha")
117            .with_markdown("Inbox/Beta.md", "# Beta")
118            .build();
119        let db_dir = tempdir().unwrap();
120        let db = Database::init(db_dir.path().join("indexer-command.sqlite").to_str().unwrap())
121            .await
122            .unwrap();
123        let search_dir = tempdir().unwrap();
124        let state = AppState::new(
125            db,
126            SearchIndex::open_or_create(&search_dir.path().join("search-index")).unwrap(),
127        );
128        let grafeo_state = ManagedGrafeoConnection::default();
129
130        *state.file_index.lock().await = Some(FileIndex::build(vault.path().to_str().unwrap()).unwrap());
131        *state.asset_index.lock().await = Some(AssetIndex::build(vault.path().to_str().unwrap()).unwrap());
132
133        let result = run_sync_vault(&state, &grafeo_state, vault.path().to_str().unwrap())
134            .await
135            .unwrap();
136
137        assert!(result.success);
138        assert_eq!(result.files_indexed, 2);
139        assert!(state.file_index.lock().await.is_none());
140        assert!(state.asset_index.lock().await.is_none());
141    }
142}
links.rs - sourceSkip to main content

Files

tessellum_lib\commands/
links.rs

1use regex::Regex;
2use std::sync::LazyLock;
3use tauri::State;
4
5use crate::error::TessellumError;
6use crate::models::{AppState, WikiLink};
7
8static WIKILINK_RE: LazyLock<Regex> = LazyLock::new(|| Regex::new(r"(\\)?\[\[(.*?)\]\]").unwrap());
9
10/// Extracts all wikilinks from the given input string.
11///
12/// Wikilinks are denoted by the pattern `[[...]]`, where "..." represents
13/// the content of the link. This function uses a statically compiled regex
14/// to find all occurrences and extracts their inner content.
15pub fn extract_wikilinks(content: &str) -> Vec<WikiLink> {
16    WIKILINK_RE
17        .captures_iter(content)
18        .filter_map(|c| {
19            // If there is a backslash before `[[`, this was an escaped literal
20            if c.get(1).is_some() {
21                None
22            } else {
23                let inner = c[2].to_string();
24                
25                // Split on | to separate target from alias
26                if let Some(pipe_pos) = inner.find('|') {
27                    let target = inner[..pipe_pos].trim().to_string();
28                    let alias = inner[pipe_pos + 1..].trim().to_string();
29                    Some(WikiLink {
30                        target,
31                        alias: Some(alias),
32                    })
33                } else {
34                    Some(WikiLink {
35                        target: inner.trim().to_string(),
36                        alias: None,
37                    })
38                }
39            }
40        })
41        .collect()
42}
43
44/// Get all files that link to the specified file (backlinks).
45#[tauri::command]
46pub async fn get_backlinks(
47    state: State<'_, AppState>,
48    path: String,
49) -> Result<Vec<String>, TessellumError> {
50    let db = state.db.clone();
51    let normalized = crate::utils::normalize_path(&path);
52    db
53        .get_backlinks(&normalized)
54        .await
55        .map_err(TessellumError::from)
56}
57
58/// Get all files that the specified file links to (outgoing links).
59#[tauri::command]
60pub async fn get_outgoing_links(
61    state: State<'_, AppState>,
62    path: String,
63) -> Result<Vec<String>, TessellumError> {
64    let db = state.db.clone();
65    let normalized = crate::utils::normalize_path(&path);
66    db
67        .get_outgoing_links(&normalized)
68        .await
69        .map_err(TessellumError::from)
70}
71
72/// Get all links in the vault (for graph visualization).
73/// Returns a vector of [source_path, target_path] pairs.
74#[tauri::command]
75pub async fn get_all_links(
76    state: State<'_, AppState>,
77) -> Result<Vec<(String, String)>, TessellumError> {
78    let db = state.db.clone();
79    db.get_all_links().await.map_err(TessellumError::from)
80}
81
82/// Resolves a wikilink target to its full path.
83/// Uses the cached in-memory FileIndex for fast lookup without traversing the filesystem.
84#[tauri::command]
85pub async fn resolve_wikilink(
86    state: State<'_, AppState>,
87    vault_path: String,
88    target: String,
89) -> Result<Option<String>, TessellumError> {
90    let resolved_note = {
91        let mut index_guard = state.file_index.lock().await;
92
93        // Build markdown index if not cached yet
94        if index_guard.is_none() {
95            let idx = crate::models::FileIndex::build(&vault_path)
96                .map_err(|e| TessellumError::Internal(format!("Failed to build file index: {}", e)))?;
97            *index_guard = Some(idx);
98        }
99
100        index_guard
101            .as_ref()
102            .and_then(|file_index| file_index.resolve(&vault_path, &target))
103    };
104
105    if let Some(path) = resolved_note {
106        return Ok(Some(crate::utils::normalize_path(&path.to_string_lossy())));
107    }
108
109    // Wikilinks can target media too (e.g. [[image.png]]), so fall back to the asset index.
110    let resolved_asset = {
111        let mut index_guard = state.asset_index.lock().await;
112
113        if index_guard.is_none() {
114            let idx = crate::models::AssetIndex::build(&vault_path)
115                .map_err(|e| TessellumError::Internal(format!("Failed to build asset index: {}", e)))?;
116            *index_guard = Some(idx);
117        }
118
119        index_guard
120            .as_ref()
121            .and_then(|asset_index| asset_index.resolve(&vault_path, &target))
122    };
123
124	Ok(resolved_asset
125        .map(|p| crate::utils::normalize_path(&p.to_string_lossy())))
126}
127
128#[cfg(test)]
129mod tests {
130    use super::extract_wikilinks;
131
132    #[test]
133    fn extracts_plain_and_aliased_wikilinks() {
134        let links = extract_wikilinks("See [[Alpha]] and [[Beta|Shown Beta]] today.");
135
136        assert_eq!(links.len(), 2);
137        assert_eq!(links[0].target, "Alpha");
138        assert_eq!(links[0].alias, None);
139        assert_eq!(links[1].target, "Beta");
140        assert_eq!(links[1].alias.as_deref(), Some("Shown Beta"));
141    }
142
143    #[test]
144    fn ignores_escaped_wikilinks_and_trims_inner_whitespace() {
145        let links = extract_wikilinks(r"\[[Ignored]] [[  Folder/Note  |  Alias  ]]");
146
147        assert_eq!(links.len(), 1);
148        assert_eq!(links[0].target, "Folder/Note");
149        assert_eq!(links[0].alias.as_deref(), Some("Alias"));
150    }
151}

notes.rs

1use chrono::Local;
2use serde::Serialize;
3use std::collections::HashSet;
4use std::fs;
5use std::path::{Component, Path, PathBuf};
6use std::time::{SystemTime, UNIX_EPOCH};
7use tauri::State;
8use tauri::async_runtime;
9use tokio::time::{Duration, timeout};
10use walkdir::WalkDir;
11use crate::commands::extract_wikilinks;
12use crate::commands::templates::{apply_placeholders, templates_dir};
13use crate::error::TessellumError;
14use crate::indexer::VaultIndexer;
15use crate::grafeo_projection::{
16    ManagedGrafeoConnection, sync_full, sync_link_create, sync_link_delete, sync_note_delete,
17    sync_note_upsert,
18};
19use crate::models::{AppState, FileIndex, FileMetadata};
20use crate::search::SearchDoc;
21use crate::trash::{
22    build_restored_destination_path, generate_unique_trash_path, parse_trash_entry_name,
23    parse_trash_timestamp, permanently_delete_trash_entry, rename_recursively,
24    restore_trashed_names_recursively,
25};
26use crate::utils::config::load_or_init_config;
27use crate::utils::{extract_tags, sanitize_string, validate_path_in_vault};
28
29struct NoteSyncDelta {
30    note_id: String,
31    previous_links: Vec<String>,
32    current_links: Vec<String>,
33}
34
35#[derive(Serialize)]
36pub struct TrashItemsResult {
37    deleted_paths: Vec<String>,
38    failed: Vec<TrashItemFailure>,
39}
40
41#[derive(Serialize)]
42pub struct TrashItemFailure {
43    item_path: String,
44    message: String,
45}
46
47#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize)]
48pub struct TrashItemMetadata {
49    path: String,
50    filename: String,
51    display_name: String,
52    original_name: String,
53    parent_label: String,
54    restore_path: String,
55    is_dir: bool,
56    timestamp: u128,
57}
58
59fn get_trash_dir(vault_root: &Path) -> PathBuf {
60    vault_root.join(".trash")
61}
62
63fn canonicalize_existing_path(path: &Path) -> Result<PathBuf, TessellumError> {
64    path.canonicalize().map_err(|error| {
65        if error.kind() == std::io::ErrorKind::NotFound {
66            TessellumError::NotFound(path.to_string_lossy().to_string())
67        } else {
68            TessellumError::Io(error)
69        }
70    })
71}
72
73fn validate_top_level_trash_entry(trash_item_path: &Path, vault_root: &Path) -> Result<PathBuf, TessellumError> {
74    let resolved_item = canonicalize_existing_path(trash_item_path)?;
75    let resolved_trash_dir = canonicalize_existing_path(&get_trash_dir(vault_root))?;
76    
77    let parent = resolved_item.parent().ok_or_else(|| {
78        TessellumError::Validation("Trash entry must have a parent directory".to_string())
79    })?;
80    
81    if parent != resolved_trash_dir {
82        return Err(TessellumError::Validation(
83            "Trash actions only support top-level .trash entries".to_string(),
84        ));
85    }
86    
87    Ok(resolved_item)
88}
89
90fn candidate_directory_priority(path: &Path) -> (usize, String) {
91    (
92        path.components().count(),
93        crate::utils::normalize_path(&path.to_string_lossy()),
94    )
95}
96
97fn resolve_restore_directory(vault_root: &Path, parent_label: &str) -> PathBuf {
98    if parent_label.eq_ignore_ascii_case("Root") {
99        return vault_root.to_path_buf();
100    }
101    
102    let mut matches: Vec<PathBuf> = WalkDir::new(vault_root)
103        .into_iter()
104        .filter_map(|entry| entry.ok())
105        .map(|entry| entry.into_path())
106        .filter(|path| path.is_dir())
107        .filter(|path| !path.starts_with(get_trash_dir(vault_root)))
108        .filter(|path| {
109            path.file_name()
110                .and_then(|value| value.to_str())
111                .map(|value| value == parent_label)
112                .unwrap_or(false)
113        })
114        .collect();
115    
116    matches.sort_by_key(|path| candidate_directory_priority(path));
117    matches
118        .into_iter()
119        .next()
120        .unwrap_or_else(|| vault_root.join(parent_label))
121}
122
123fn build_trash_item_metadata(vault_root: &Path, entry_path: &Path) -> Option<TrashItemMetadata> {
124    let filename = entry_path.file_name()?.to_string_lossy().to_string();
125    let is_dir = entry_path.is_dir();
126    let timestamp = parse_trash_timestamp(&filename)?;
127    let parsed = parse_trash_entry_name(&filename, is_dir)?;
128    let restore_dir = resolve_restore_directory(vault_root, &parsed.parent_label);
129    let restore_path = restore_dir.join(&parsed.original_name);
130    
131    Some(TrashItemMetadata {
132        path: crate::utils::normalize_path(&entry_path.to_string_lossy()),
133        filename,
134        display_name: parsed.original_name.clone(),
135        original_name: parsed.original_name.clone(),
136        parent_label: parsed.parent_label,
137        restore_path: crate::utils::normalize_path(&restore_path.to_string_lossy()),
138        is_dir,
139        timestamp,
140    })
141}
142
143fn list_trash_items_internal(vault_root: &Path) -> Result<Vec<TrashItemMetadata>, TessellumError> {
144    let trash_dir = get_trash_dir(vault_root);
145    if !trash_dir.exists() {
146        return Ok(Vec::new());
147    }
148    
149    let entries = fs::read_dir(&trash_dir).map_err(TessellumError::Io)?;
150    let mut items = Vec::new();
151    
152    for entry in entries {
153        let entry = entry.map_err(TessellumError::Io)?;
154        if let Some(item) = build_trash_item_metadata(vault_root, &entry.path()) {
155            items.push(item);
156        }
157    }
158    
159    items.sort_by(|left, right| right.timestamp.cmp(&left.timestamp));
160    Ok(items)
161}
162
163fn restore_trash_item_internal_for_tests(
164    vault_root: &Path,
165    trash_item_path: &Path,
166) -> Result<PathBuf, TessellumError> {
167    let resolved_entry = validate_top_level_trash_entry(trash_item_path, vault_root)?;
168    let filename = resolved_entry
169        .file_name()
170        .and_then(|value| value.to_str())
171        .ok_or_else(|| TessellumError::Validation("Invalid trash entry name".to_string()))?;
172    let is_dir = resolved_entry.is_dir();
173    let parsed = parse_trash_entry_name(filename, is_dir)
174        .ok_or_else(|| TessellumError::Validation("Invalid trash entry format".to_string()))?;
175    let restore_dir = resolve_restore_directory(vault_root, &parsed.parent_label);
176    fs::create_dir_all(&restore_dir).map_err(TessellumError::Io)?;
177    let destination = build_restored_destination_path(&restore_dir, &parsed.original_name)
178        .ok_or_else(|| TessellumError::Validation("Failed to resolve restore destination".to_string()))?;
179    fs::rename(&resolved_entry, &destination).map_err(TessellumError::Io)?;
180    if destination.is_dir() {
181        restore_trashed_names_recursively(&destination).map_err(TessellumError::Io)?;
182    }
183    Ok(destination)
184}
185
186async fn refresh_indexes_after_restore(
187    state: &State<'_, AppState>,
188    kuzu_state: &State<'_, ManagedGrafeoConnection>,
189    vault_path: &str,
190) {
191    let db = state.db.clone();
192    let search_index = state.search_index.clone();
193    
194    if let Err(error) = VaultIndexer::full_sync(db.as_ref(), search_index, vault_path).await {
195        eprintln!("Vault sync failed after restore: {}", error);
196    }
197    
198    if let Err(error) = sync_full(kuzu_state.inner(), db.as_ref()).await {
199        eprintln!("Kuzu sync_full failed after restore: {}", error);
200    }
201    
202    let mut idx_guard = state.file_index.lock().await;
203    *idx_guard = None;
204    let mut asset_guard = state.asset_index.lock().await;
205    *asset_guard = None;
206}
207
208fn build_daily_note_relative_path(template: &str, now: chrono::DateTime<Local>) -> String {
209    let year = now.format("%Y").to_string();
210    let month = now.format("%m").to_string();
211    let day = now.format("%d").to_string();
212    
213    let mut path = template
214        .replace("{YYYY}", &year)
215        .replace("{MM}", &month)
216        .replace("{DD}", &day)
217        .replace('\\', "/");
218    
219    if !path.to_lowercase().ends_with(".md") {
220        path = format!("{}.md", path);
221    }
222    
223    path
224}
225
226fn validate_template_name(template_name: &str) -> Result<(), TessellumError> {
227    let trimmed = template_name.trim();
228    if trimmed.is_empty() {
229        return Err(TessellumError::Validation(
230            "Template name cannot be empty".to_string(),
231        ));
232    }
233    
234    let mut components = Path::new(trimmed).components();
235    match (components.next(), components.next()) {
236        (Some(Component::Normal(_)), None) => Ok(()),
237        _ => Err(TessellumError::Validation(
238            "Template name must be a filename without path separators".to_string(),
239        )),
240    }
241}
242
243async fn index_note_content(
244    state: &State<'_, AppState>,
245    vault_path: &str,
246    path: &str,
247    content: &str,
248) -> Result<NoteSyncDelta, TessellumError> {
249    let db = state.db.clone();
250    let previous_links = db
251        .get_outgoing_links(path)
252        .await
253        .map_err(TessellumError::from)?;
254    
255    let metadata = tokio::fs::metadata(&path).await.map_err(|e| {
256        TessellumError::Io(std::io::Error::new(
257            std::io::ErrorKind::Other,
258            format!("Failed to get metadata for {}: {}", path, e),
259        ))
260    })?;
261    
262    let size = metadata.len();
263    let modified = metadata
264        .modified()
265        .map_err(|e| {
266            TessellumError::Io(std::io::Error::new(
267                std::io::ErrorKind::Other,
268                format!("Failed to get modified time: {}", e),
269            ))
270        })?
271        .duration_since(UNIX_EPOCH)
272        .unwrap_or_default()
273        .as_secs() as i64;
274    
275    let mut frontmatter_json_str = None;
276    let mut body_content = content;
277    
278    if let Some((yaml, _)) = crate::utils::frontmatter::parse_frontmatter(&content) {
279        body_content = crate::utils::frontmatter::strip_frontmatter(&content);
280        if let Ok(json) = crate::utils::frontmatter::frontmatter_to_json(&yaml) {
281            frontmatter_json_str = Some(json);
282        }
283    }
284    
285    let inline_tags = extract_tags(content);
286    
287    let inline_tags_json_str = if inline_tags.is_empty() {
288        None
289    } else {
290        serde_json::to_string(&inline_tags).ok()
291    };
292    
293    let wikilinks = extract_wikilinks(body_content);
294    
295    let index_guard = state.file_index.lock().await;
296    let file_index = match index_guard.as_ref() {
297        Some(idx) => idx.clone(),
298        None => {
299            drop(index_guard);
300            let idx = FileIndex::build(&vault_path).map_err(|e| {
301                TessellumError::Internal(format!("Failed to build file index: {}", e))
302            })?;
303            let mut guard = state.file_index.lock().await;
304            *guard = Some(idx.clone());
305            idx
306        }
307    };
308    
309    let resolved_links: Vec<String> = wikilinks
310        .iter()
311        .map(|link| {
312            crate::utils::normalize_path(
313                &file_index
314                    .resolve_or_default(&vault_path, &link.target)
315                    .to_string_lossy(),
316            )
317        })
318        .collect();
319    let mut deduped_links = resolved_links.clone();
320    deduped_links.sort();
321    deduped_links.dedup();
322    
323    db
324        .index_file(
325            &path,
326            modified,
327            size,
328            frontmatter_json_str.as_deref(),
329            inline_tags_json_str.as_deref(),
330            &resolved_links,
331        )
332        .await
333        .map_err(TessellumError::from)?;
334    
335    db
336        .set_note_tags(&path, &inline_tags)
337        .await
338        .map_err(TessellumError::from)?;
339    db
340        .upsert_search_file(&path, modified, true)
341        .await
342        .map_err(TessellumError::from)?;
343    
344    let title = Path::new(path)
345        .file_name()
346        .unwrap_or_default()
347        .to_string_lossy()
348        .to_string()
349        .trim_end_matches(".md")
350        .to_string();
351    
352    let doc = SearchDoc {
353        path: crate::utils::normalize_path(path),
354        title,
355        body: body_content.to_string(),
356        tags: inline_tags,
357    };
358    
359    let search_index = state.search_index.clone();
360    async_runtime::spawn_blocking(move || {
361        let guard = async_runtime::block_on(search_index.lock());
362        guard.index_batch(&[doc], &[]).ok();
363    });
364    
365    log::debug!(
366        "Indexed file: {} with {} resolved links",
367        path,
368        resolved_links.len()
369    );
370    
371    Ok(NoteSyncDelta {
372        note_id: crate::utils::normalize_path(path),
373        previous_links,
374        current_links: deduped_links,
375    })
376}
377
378async fn sync_note_delta_non_critical(
379    state: &State<'_, AppState>,
380    kuzu_state: &State<'_, ManagedGrafeoConnection>,
381    delta: NoteSyncDelta,
382) {
383    let db = state.db.clone();
384    if let Err(err) = sync_note_upsert(kuzu_state.inner(), db.as_ref(), &delta.note_id).await {
385        eprintln!(
386            "Kuzu sync_note_upsert failed for '{}': {}",
387            delta.note_id, err
388        );
389        return;
390    }
391    
392    let previous: HashSet<String> = delta.previous_links.into_iter().collect();
393    let current: HashSet<String> = delta.current_links.into_iter().collect();
394    
395    for to_id in current.difference(&previous) {
396        if let Err(err) = sync_link_create(kuzu_state.inner(), &delta.note_id, to_id) {
397            eprintln!(
398                "Kuzu sync_link_create failed for '{} -> {}': {}",
399                delta.note_id, to_id, err
400            );
401        }
402    }
403    
404    for to_id in previous.difference(&current) {
405        if let Err(err) = sync_link_delete(kuzu_state.inner(), &delta.note_id, to_id) {
406            eprintln!(
407                "Kuzu sync_link_delete failed for '{} -> {}': {}",
408                delta.note_id, to_id, err
409            );
410        }
411    }
412}
413
414/// Creates a new note file in the specified vault directory with a unique name.
415///
416/// This function takes in a vault path and a title string to create a new `.md`
417/// file in the specified vault directory. If the provided title contains
418/// invalid characters or is empty, it is sanitized or defaulted to "Untitled".
419/// If a file with the same name already exists, the function appends a numeric suffix
420/// to the filename to ensure its uniqueness.
421#[tauri::command]
422pub async fn create_note(
423    state: State<'_, AppState>,
424    kuzu_state: State<'_, ManagedGrafeoConnection>,
425    vault_path: String,
426    title: String,
427) -> Result<String, TessellumError> {
428    validate_path_in_vault(&vault_path, &vault_path).map_err(|e| TessellumError::Validation(e))?;
429    
430    let clean_title = sanitize_string(title);
431    
432    if clean_title.trim().is_empty() {
433        return Err(TessellumError::Validation(
434            "Title cannot be empty".to_string(),
435        ));
436    }
437    
438    // Create a file path
439    let mut filename = if clean_title.to_lowercase().ends_with(".md") {
440        clean_title.clone()
441    } else {
442        format!("{}.md", clean_title)
443    };
444    let mut file_path = Path::new(&vault_path).join(&filename);
445    let mut collision_index = 1;
446    
447    // Check for collisions in the filenames
448    while file_path.exists() {
449        let stem = clean_title.strip_suffix(".md").unwrap_or(&clean_title);
450        filename = format!("{} ({}).md", stem, collision_index);
451        file_path = Path::new(&vault_path).join(&filename);
452        collision_index += 1;
453    }
454    
455    // Create an empty file
456    tokio::fs::write(&file_path, String::new())
457        .await
458        .map_err(TessellumError::from)?;
459    
460    let path_str = crate::utils::normalize_path(&file_path.to_string_lossy());
461    
462    // Update the index immediately if DB is ready
463    let db = state.db.clone();
464    db
465        .index_file(&path_str, 0, 0, None, None, &[])
466        .await
467        .unwrap_or_else(|e| log::warn!("Failed to index new file: {}", e));
468    db
469        .set_note_tags(&path_str, &[])
470        .await
471        .unwrap_or_else(|e| log::warn!("Failed to index new tags: {}", e));
472    db
473        .upsert_search_file(&path_str, 0, true)
474        .await
475        .unwrap_or_else(|e| log::warn!("Failed to index search file: {}", e));
476    
477    // Invalidate the cache since a new file exists
478    let mut idx_guard = state.file_index.lock().await;
479    *idx_guard = None;
480    let mut asset_guard = state.asset_index.lock().await;
481    *asset_guard = None;
482    
483    let search_index = state.search_index.clone();
484    let title = Path::new(&path_str)
485        .file_name()
486        .unwrap_or_default()
487        .to_string_lossy()
488        .to_string()
489        .trim_end_matches(".md")
490        .to_string();
491    let doc = SearchDoc {
492        path: path_str.clone(),
493        title,
494        body: String::new(),
495        tags: Vec::new(),
496    };
497    async_runtime::spawn_blocking(move || {
498        let guard = async_runtime::block_on(search_index.lock());
499        guard.index_batch(&[doc], &[]).ok();
500    });
501    
502    let db = state.db.clone();
503    if let Err(err) = sync_note_upsert(kuzu_state.inner(), db.as_ref(), &path_str).await {
504        eprintln!("Kuzu sync_note_upsert failed for '{}': {}", path_str, err);
505    }
506    
507    Ok(path_str)
508}
509
510#[tauri::command]
511pub async fn get_or_create_daily_note(
512    state: State<'_, AppState>,
513    kuzu_state: State<'_, ManagedGrafeoConnection>,
514    vault_path: String,
515) -> Result<FileMetadata, TessellumError> {
516    validate_path_in_vault(&vault_path, &vault_path).map_err(|e| TessellumError::Validation(e))?;
517    
518    let config = load_or_init_config(&vault_path)?;
519    let now = Local::now();
520    let relative_path = build_daily_note_relative_path(&config.daily_notes.path_template, now);
521    let full_path = Path::new(&vault_path).join(&relative_path);
522    if Path::new(&relative_path).is_absolute() {
523        return Err(TessellumError::Validation(
524            "Daily note path must be relative".to_string(),
525        ));
526    }
527    
528    let full_path_str = crate::utils::normalize_path(&full_path.to_string_lossy());
529    
530    if let Some(parent) = full_path.parent() {
531        tokio::fs::create_dir_all(parent)
532            .await
533            .map_err(TessellumError::from)?;
534        
535        let parent_str = crate::utils::normalize_path(&parent.to_string_lossy());
536        validate_path_in_vault(&parent_str, &vault_path)
537            .map_err(|e| TessellumError::Validation(e))?;
538    }
539    
540    if !full_path.exists() {
541        let title = now.format("%Y-%m-%d").to_string();
542        let template_name = config.daily_notes.template_name.trim();
543        validate_template_name(template_name)?;
544        let template_path = templates_dir(&vault_path).join(format!("{}.md", template_name));
545        
546        let content = if template_path.exists() {
547            validate_path_in_vault(&template_path.to_string_lossy(), &vault_path)
548                .map_err(TessellumError::Validation)?;
549            let template_content = tokio::fs::read_to_string(&template_path)
550                .await
551                .map_err(TessellumError::from)?;
552            apply_placeholders(&template_content, &title, &vault_path, now)
553        } else {
554            format!("# {}\n", title)
555        };
556        
557        tokio::fs::write(&full_path, &content)
558            .await
559            .map_err(TessellumError::from)?;
560        
561        let delta = index_note_content(&state, &vault_path, &full_path_str, &content).await?;
562        sync_note_delta_non_critical(&state, &kuzu_state, delta).await;
563        
564        let mut idx_guard = state.file_index.lock().await;
565        *idx_guard = None;
566        let mut asset_guard = state.asset_index.lock().await;
567        *asset_guard = None;
568    }
569    
570    let metadata = tokio::fs::metadata(&full_path).await.map_err(|e| {
571        TessellumError::Io(std::io::Error::new(
572            std::io::ErrorKind::Other,
573            format!("Failed to get metadata for {}: {}", full_path_str, e),
574        ))
575    })?;
576    
577    let filename = full_path
578        .file_name()
579        .unwrap_or_default()
580        .to_string_lossy()
581        .to_string();
582    
583    Ok(FileMetadata {
584        path: full_path_str,
585        filename,
586        is_dir: false,
587        size: metadata.len(),
588        last_modified: metadata
589            .modified()
590            .map_err(|e| {
591                TessellumError::Io(std::io::Error::new(
592                    std::io::ErrorKind::Other,
593                    format!("Failed to get modified time: {}", e),
594                ))
595            })?
596            .duration_since(UNIX_EPOCH)
597            .unwrap_or_default()
598            .as_secs() as i64,
599    })
600}
601
602/// Moves a note or folder to a trash directory within the specified vault directory.
603///
604/// This function is useful for "soft-deleting" items by moving them to a `.trash`
605/// subdirectory within a vault, while ensuring that the filenames are unique
606/// using a timestamp.
607async fn trash_item_internal(
608    state: State<'_, AppState>,
609    kuzu_state: State<'_, ManagedGrafeoConnection>,
610    item_path: String,
611    vault_path: String,
612) -> Result<(), TessellumError> {
613    validate_path_in_vault(&item_path, &vault_path).map_err(|e| TessellumError::Validation(e))?;
614    
615    let item = Path::new(&item_path);
616    if !item.exists() {
617        
618        return Err(TessellumError::NotFound("Item does not exist".to_string()));
619    }
620    let was_file = item.is_file();
621    
622    let vault_root = Path::new(&vault_path);
623    let trash_dir = vault_root.join(".trash");
624    
625    if !trash_dir.exists() {
626        fs::create_dir_all(&trash_dir)
627            .map_err(TessellumError::Io)?;
628    }
629    
630    let timestamp = SystemTime::now()
631        .duration_since(UNIX_EPOCH)
632        .unwrap()
633        .as_millis();
634    
635    let trash_path = generate_unique_trash_path(&trash_dir, item, timestamp)
636        .ok_or_else(|| TessellumError::Validation("Failed to generate trash name".to_string()))?;
637    
638    tokio::fs::rename(item, &trash_path)
639        .await
640        .map_err(TessellumError::Io)?;
641    
642    // Recursively rename contents if it's a directory
643    if trash_path.is_dir() {
644        rename_recursively(&trash_path, timestamp).map_err(TessellumError::Io)?;
645    }
646    
647    // Database/index cleanup is best-effort. The file is already moved to trash,
648    // so we avoid blocking the entire bulk operation on long-running DB operations.
649    let db = state.db.clone();
650    
651    match timeout(Duration::from_secs(5), db.delete_file(&item_path)).await {
652        Ok(Ok(())) => {}
653        Ok(Err(_)) => {},
654        Err(_) => todo!()
655    }
656    
657    match timeout(
658        Duration::from_secs(5),
659        db.delete_search_files(&[item_path.clone()]),
660    )
661        .await
662    {
663        Ok(Ok(_)) => {}
664        Err(_) => {
665        }
666        _ => {}
667    }
668    
669    
670    let search_index = state.search_index.clone();
671    let path = item_path.clone();
672    async_runtime::spawn_blocking(move || {
673        let guard = async_runtime::block_on(search_index.lock());
674        guard.delete_path(&path).ok();
675    });
676    
677    // Invalidate the cache
678    let mut idx_guard = state.file_index.lock().await;
679    *idx_guard = None;
680    let mut asset_guard = state.asset_index.lock().await;
681    *asset_guard = None;
682    
683    if was_file {
684        if let Err(err) = sync_note_delete(kuzu_state.inner(), &crate::utils::normalize_path(&item_path)) {
685            eprintln!("Kuzu sync_note_delete failed for '{}': {}", item_path, err);
686        }
687    } else {
688        match timeout(Duration::from_secs(5), sync_full(kuzu_state.inner(), db.as_ref())).await {
689            Ok(Ok(())) => {}
690            Ok(Err(err)) => {
691                eprintln!(
692                    "Kuzu sync_full failed after trashing '{}': {}",
693                    item_path, err
694                );
695            }
696            Err(_) => {
697            }
698        }
699    }
700    
701    Ok(())
702}
703
704#[tauri::command]
705pub async fn trash_item(
706    state: State<'_, AppState>,
707    kuzu_state: State<'_, ManagedGrafeoConnection>,
708    item_path: String,
709    vault_path: String,
710) -> Result<(), TessellumError> {
711    trash_item_internal(state, kuzu_state, item_path, vault_path).await
712}
713
714#[tauri::command]
715pub async fn trash_items(
716    state: State<'_, AppState>,
717    kuzu_state: State<'_, ManagedGrafeoConnection>,
718    item_paths: Vec<String>,
719    vault_path: String,
720) -> Result<TrashItemsResult, TessellumError> {
721    
722    let mut deleted_paths = Vec::new();
723    let mut failed = Vec::new();
724    
725    for (_index, item_path) in item_paths.into_iter().enumerate() {
726        
727        match trash_item_internal(
728            state.clone(),
729            kuzu_state.clone(),
730            item_path.clone(),
731            vault_path.clone(),
732        )
733            .await
734        {
735            Ok(()) => {
736                
737                deleted_paths.push(item_path);
738            }
739            Err(error) => {
740                let message = error.to_string();
741                
742                failed.push(TrashItemFailure { item_path, message });
743            }
744        }
745    }
746    
747    Ok(TrashItemsResult {
748        deleted_paths,
749        failed,
750    })
751}
752
753#[tauri::command]
754pub async fn list_trash_items(vault_path: String) -> Result<Vec<TrashItemMetadata>, TessellumError> {
755    validate_path_in_vault(&vault_path, &vault_path).map_err(|error| TessellumError::Validation(error))?;
756    list_trash_items_internal(Path::new(&vault_path))
757}
758
759#[tauri::command]
760pub async fn restore_trash_item(
761    state: State<'_, AppState>,
762    kuzu_state: State<'_, ManagedGrafeoConnection>,
763    trash_item_path: String,
764    vault_path: String,
765) -> Result<String, TessellumError> {
766    validate_path_in_vault(&vault_path, &vault_path).map_err(|error| TessellumError::Validation(error))?;
767    let vault_root = Path::new(&vault_path);
768    let restored_path = restore_trash_item_internal_for_tests(vault_root, Path::new(&trash_item_path))?;
769    let normalized_restored_path = crate::utils::normalize_path(&restored_path.to_string_lossy());
770    refresh_indexes_after_restore(&state, &kuzu_state, &vault_path).await;
771    Ok(normalized_restored_path)
772}
773
774#[tauri::command]
775pub async fn delete_trash_item_permanently(
776    trash_item_path: String,
777    vault_path: String,
778) -> Result<(), TessellumError> {
779    validate_path_in_vault(&vault_path, &vault_path).map_err(|error| TessellumError::Validation(error))?;
780    let resolved_entry = validate_top_level_trash_entry(Path::new(&trash_item_path), Path::new(&vault_path))?;
781    permanently_delete_trash_entry(&resolved_entry).map_err(TessellumError::Io)
782}
783
784/// Reads the contents of a file at the given path and returns it as a `String`.
785/// The path is validated to be inside the vault directory.
786#[tauri::command]
787pub async fn read_file(vault_path: String, path: String) -> Result<String, TessellumError> {
788    // Validate path inside vault
789    validate_path_in_vault(&path, &vault_path).map_err(|e| TessellumError::Validation(e))?;
790    
791    tokio::fs::read_to_string(&path)
792        .await
793        .map_err(TessellumError::from)
794}
795
796/// Writes the specified content to a file at the given path.
797/// Also updates the database index with resolved wikilinks.
798#[tauri::command]
799pub async fn write_file(
800    state: State<'_, AppState>,
801    kuzu_state: State<'_, ManagedGrafeoConnection>,
802    vault_path: String,
803    path: String,
804    content: String,
805) -> Result<(), TessellumError> {
806    // Validate path inside vault
807    validate_path_in_vault(&path, &vault_path).map_err(|e| TessellumError::Validation(e))?;
808    
809    // Write file
810    tokio::fs::write(&path, &content)
811        .await
812        .map_err(TessellumError::from)?;
813    
814    let delta = index_note_content(&state, &vault_path, &path, &content).await?;
815    sync_note_delta_non_critical(&state, &kuzu_state, delta).await;
816    
817    Ok(())
818}
819
820#[tauri::command]
821pub async fn get_all_notes(
822    state: State<'_, AppState>,
823) -> Result<Vec<(String, i64)>, TessellumError> {
824    let db = state.db.clone();
825    db
826        .get_all_indexed_files()
827        .await
828        .map_err(TessellumError::from)
829}
830
831#[derive(Serialize)]
832pub struct NoteSuggestion {
833    pub name: String,
834    pub relative_path: String,
835    pub full_path: String,
836}
837
838/// Search for notes matching a query.
839/// Returns suggestions formatted for the wikilink auto-complete.
840#[tauri::command]
841pub async fn search_notes(
842    state: State<'_, AppState>,
843    vault_path: String,
844    query: String,
845) -> Result<Vec<NoteSuggestion>, TessellumError> {
846    let db = state.db.clone();
847    let files = db
848        .get_all_indexed_files()
849        .await
850        .map_err(TessellumError::from)?;
851    
852    let query_lower = query.to_lowercase();
853    let vault_root = Path::new(&vault_path);
854    
855    let mut suggestions = Vec::new();
856    
857    for (path_str, _) in files {
858        let path = Path::new(&path_str);
859        
860        let filename = path
861            .file_name()
862            .unwrap_or_default()
863            .to_string_lossy()
864            .to_string();
865        
866        let name = filename
867            .strip_suffix(".md")
868            .unwrap_or(&filename)
869            .to_string();
870        
871        let relative_path = if let Ok(rel) = path.strip_prefix(vault_root) {
872            crate::utils::normalize_path(&rel.to_string_lossy())
873        } else {
874            crate::utils::normalize_path(&path_str)
875        };
876        
877        if query_lower.is_empty()
878            || name.to_lowercase().contains(&query_lower)
879            || relative_path.to_lowercase().contains(&query_lower)
880        {
881            suggestions.push(NoteSuggestion {
882                name,
883                relative_path,
884                full_path: crate::utils::normalize_path(&path_str),
885            });
886        }
887    }
888    
889    Ok(suggestions)
890}
891
